sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85082" key="polu/misqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-μισθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85082.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">receiving much pay</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hire,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
